//: Example of ~/.g2cc/config.json (first run writes real defaults + a random authToken; missing keys fall back to defaults — you only need the overrides). NEVER commit a real config.json.

notifications.//: Android package → priority (call|timer|sms|email|info). Unlisted packages = 'info'. NOTE: the map REPLACES the defaults wholesale when present (no per-package merge) — copy the defaults you want to keep.

de.//: DE shell (Phase 2 overhaul). rootNav 'menu' = the proven category launcher (default); 'ribbon' = the MRU recents ribbon — flip to 'ribbon' + restart the server to try it on glass. recentsDepth = hot windows before the 'All' drawer (keep small so the bottom strip never overflows).
